Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product in the inventory system.

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit, a unique identifier for the product.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the product is currently active and available for sale.

stockLevel.description: Current stock level of the product.

TaxType.title: TaxType
TaxType.description: Represents a tax type applicable to products.

id.description: Unique identifier for the tax type.

name.description: Name of the tax type (e.g., VAT, Sales Tax).

InventoryMovement.title: InventoryMovement
InventoryMovement.description: Represents a movement of inventory (e.g., incoming stock, outgoing sale).

id.description: Unique identifier for the inventory movement.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product moved (positive for incoming, negative for outgoing).

movementDate.description: Date and time of the inventory movement.

movementType.description: Type of inventory movement (e.g., Purchase, Sale, Adjustment).

customerId.description: Reference to Customer. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Sale). Defaults to 'Cliente Eventual' if no customer is specified.

saleDate.description: Date and time of the sale.

SaleItem.title: SaleItem
SaleItem.description: Represents an item within a sale transaction.

id.description: Unique identifier for the sale item.

unitPrice.description: Price of one unit of the product at the time of sale.

Purchase.title: Purchase
Purchase.description: Represents a purchase order for restocking inventory.

purchaseDate.description: Date and time of the purchase order.

totalAmount.description: Total amount of the purchase order.

PurchaseItem.title: PurchaseItem
PurchaseItem.description: Represents an item within a purchase order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the purchase item.

unitPrice.description: Price of one unit of the product at the time of purchase.

StoreConfig.title: StoreConfig
StoreConfig.description: Represents the configuration settings for the store.

id.description: Unique identifier for the store configuration. Should be a singleton, e.g., 'default'.

currency.description: Currency used by the store (e.g., USD, EUR).

securityPin.description: Security PIN to protect access to the system.

CashSession.title: CashSession
CashSession.description: Represents a single cash register session, from opening to closing.

storeId.description: The store this session belongs to.

openingDate.description: Timestamp of when the session was opened.

closingDate.description: Timestamp of when the session was closed.

openingBalance.description: The initial cash amount in the register.

closingBalance.description: The final counted cash amount at the end of the session.

calculatedCash.description: The expected cash amount based on transactions.

difference.description: The difference between closingBalance and calculatedCash.

status.description: The current status of the session.

openedBy.description: UID of the user who opened the session.

closedBy.description: UID of the user who closed the session.

salesIds.description: List of sale IDs associated with this session.

transactions.description: A summary of total amounts for each payment method.

definition.description: Stores the configuration for a specific store owned by a user.  Authorization is based on path-based ownership. Only the authenticated user (`request.auth.uid` === `{userId}`) can access this document.

params.name: userId
params.description: The UID of the user who owns the store.

params.name: storeId
params.description: The unique ID of the store.

params.description: The UID of the user who owns the store.

params.name: storeId
params.description: The unique ID of the store.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique ID of the product.
